visual_analysis: The visual presentation of the application is below average. The layout is basic, with minimal visual appeal and poor use of color. Text readability is compromised by a lack of contrast and absence of visual hierarchy. There is a notable disorganization in how information is presented, giving it an amateurish appearance without any real design polish.
educational_analysis: The educational value is only basic, primarily due to unclear presentation of the core concept of space complexity. The explanation is vague, lacking necessary instructional elements that would support effective learning. There are also no visible learning objectives or adequate scaffolding, which limits the pedagogical effectiveness of the material.
